name: National General Insurance Co.
description: National General Insurance, an Allstate company, is a leading provider of personal lines insurance products, including auto, homeowners, renters, and recreational vehicle coverage. With a history dating back to 1920, the company serves policyholders through a vast network of over 55,000 independent agents across the United States. Headquartered in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, National General is dedicated to providing reliable protection and exceptional customer service, offering innovative insurance solutions and a streamlined claims process to help individuals and families protect what matters most to them.
